positive: Stylized abstract bioluminescent forest scene, depicting luminous flora and fauna intertwined with crystalline geometric structures. The main elements should be silhouettes of elegant, stylized forest creatures (like deer or foxes) walking through vibrant, glowing plant life. Composition must be symmetrical and centralized, with a deep sense of layered depth. Use a color palette dominated by deep sapphire blues, neon magenta, and ethereal cyan, giving a cyberpunk fantasy feel. High contrast between the dark, matte forest floor and the glowing subject matter. Perfect for screen printing or direct-to-garment apparel art. Vector-like clarity, minimalist graphic details, volumetric lighting, highly detailed, cinematic illustration, 8K.
negative: blur, blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, low detail, poor quality, abstract watercolor, realism, hyperdetailed, grain, bokeh
